description: Gate C7 decode-throughput floors (tok/s) per (model, platform). The model matrix records measured tok/s in matrix.json row.perf[platform]; a cell below its floor fails. Floors are deliberately conservative (~50% of a healthy measurement) to catch big regressions while tolerating run-to-run noise. The CUDA qwen3-moe floor (40) is the guard that would have caught the 9.7-vs-59 tok/s MoE fast-path regression coherence+exit0 let pass.
